build_recipe:
STEP 1: Create base plate — cq.Workplane("XY").box(50, 30, 3)
STEP 2: Cut center bore — .faces(">Z").workplane().circle(4).cutThruAll()
STEP 3: Add raised feature on top — .faces(">Z").workplane(offset=3).rect(10, 10).extrude(1)
STEP 4: Add raised feature on bottom — .faces("<Z").workplane(offset=-3).rect(10, 10).extrude(1)
STEP 5: Add raised feature on left side — .faces(">X").workplane(offset=15).rect(10, 10).extrude(1)
STEP 6: Add raised feature on right side — .faces("<X").workplane(offset=-15).rect(10, 10).extrude(1)
STEP 7: Add holes for bolts — .faces(">Z").workplane().circle(2).cutThruAll()
STEP 8: Position bolt holes — .translate((0, 0, 3))
STEP 9: Repeat step 7 and 8 for each of the other three bolt holes, positioning them symmetrically around the center bore.
